detail.instructions: In src/domain.rs define EmailAddress and RegisterUserCommand. Keep fields private, expose borrowed accessors, and do not import Tokio, Actix, or serde into the domain module.

hints.body: The domain should not know which runtime or web framework calls it.
Use private owned fields and borrowed accessors.
Keep src/domain.rs free of framework imports.

detail.completionExplanation: The core register-user types are runtime-independent and can be reused by HTTP, jobs, or tests.
